music.heading: From the stage
music.sub: Live cuts and the latest promo — straight from Hudson Valley lawns and pubs.

book.heading: Book the Local Jam
book.body: Weddings, backyard parties, fundraisers, breweries, corporate nights — we tailor the set to the room. Tell us the date and we'll do the rest.

mailing.heading: Never miss a show
mailing.sub: Get our gig list in your inbox — no spam, just where we’re playing.

about.headline: A homegrown band playing in the Hudson Valley.
about.lead: A local Hudson Valley band formed in 2017, covering the top bands, artists and one-hit wonders over the past several decades!
about.body:
Our song selections focus on harmony-based hits, that cut across all generations and will have you singing along and swaying to the beat of your favorite classic songs from the 60’s, 70’s,80’s and 90’s!!

The group was built around three sisters, who have been singing and harmonizing with each other since childhood, along with guitar, keyboards, bass, drums and vocalist accompaniment.

testimonials.eyebrow: Don't just take our word for it
testimonials.heading: What our fans are saying

list.quote: They had our whole barn on its feet all night — hands down the best decision we made for the wedding.
list.name: Katie & Mark

list.quote: Read the room perfectly and kept the taproom packed right up to last call. We'll have them back.
list.name: Mill House Brewing

list.quote: Every song turned into a sing-along. Our summer concert crowd already keeps asking when they're back.
list.name: Red Hook Rec Park

list.quote: Tight, fun, and genuinely great people to work with. We book The Local Jam every year now.
list.name: Jen R.

list.quote: Fleetwood Mac to the Ramones and everything in between — they nailed all of it.
list.name: Dave M.

list.quote: The dance floor never emptied once. Cannot recommend them enough for a private event.
list.name: The Millbrook Inn
